market_summary: Global markets are under pressure due to escalating geopolitical tensions involving Iran and the US. Brent crude has surged to $112.19, driving inflation concerns. Equity markets are cautious, with a rotation towards consumer staples.
art_trends: Art world shifting to 'tactile authenticity' and experience-led collecting. Resurgence in craftsmanship, traditional painting ('just painting'), and use of unconventional materials like ceramics and ash. Focus on emotional presence and human labor.
